description: Update transform is part of the Undo system, and is used in the Undo Manager to allow undoing and redoing of moving an object.

fields.RestoreParent: Whether or not to restore the parent object.
fields.RestorePosition: Whether or not to restore the position of the object.
fields.RestoreRotation: Whether or not to restore the rotation of the object.
fields.RestoreScale: Whether or not to restore the scale of the object.
fields.ParentBefore: The parent slot that the object had before the move.
fields.ParentAfter: The parent slot the object had after the move.
fields.LocalPositionBefore: The Local Position that the object had before the move.
fields.LocalRotationBefore: The Local Rotation that the object had before the move.
fields.LocalScaleBefore: The Local Scale that the object had before the move.
fields.GlobalPositionBefore: The Global Position that the object had before the move.
fields.GlobalRotationBefore: The Global Rotation that the object had before the move.
fields.GlobalScaleBefore: The Global Scale that the object had before the move.
fields.LocalPositionAfter: The Local Position the object had after the move.
fields.LocalRotationAfter: The Local Rotation the object had after the move.
fields.LocalScaleAfter: The Local Scale the object had after the move.
fields.GlobalPositionAfter: The Global Position the object had after the move.
fields.GlobalRotationAfter: The Global Rotation the object had after the move.
fields.GlobalScaleAfter: The Global Scale the object had after the move.
fields._performed: Whether the action is performed or it is in the future (due to undoing by the user.
fields._description: The description of this move action.
